pages.title: Tide Pearl
pages.text: A remnant of drowning pressure, battlefield control, and ownership of the deep. It begins by helping the bearer survive underwater and ends by making underwater combat theirs to command.

pages.title: Stages
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants water breathing, underwater sight, underwater speed, and softer blows from aquatic creatures. The Pearl already makes the depths feel familiar.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Drowning no longer threatens the bearer at all, allowing the remnant to serve as a true underwater foundation instead of just a convenience.

pages.title: Stages Continued
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): Underwater, nearby enemies are slowed, weakened, and dragged downward. The Pearl begins controlling position, not just survival.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): The pressure field widens and the bearer begins gaining stronger offensive value underwater.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The water becomes actively hostile to nearby enemies, making escape and movement much harder.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The bearer gains Conduit Power underwater and commands the strongest version of the Pearl's suffocating field.
